Id1.text: 1036 Ganymed was discovered by Walter Baade, a German National who studied at the University of Gottingen.

Id2.text: Walter Baade, a German national who graduated from the University of Gottingen, discovered 1036 Ganymed.

Id3.text: Walter Baade, a German National, discovered 1036 Ganymed. His alma mater was the University of Gottingen.
